prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.5 kg; Height 168.6 cm; BMI 24.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 279mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 192mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.9kg; 9 months ago 69.1kg; 6 months ago 64.1kg; 3 months ago 63.3kg; current 70.5kg), Height (12 months ago 168.6cm; 9 months ago 168.6cm; 6 months ago 168.6cm; 3 months ago 168.6cm; current 168.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 24.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 38U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 39U/L), AST (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 8.3mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 663mg/g; 9 months ago 550mg/g; 6 months ago 574mg/g; 3 months ago 604mg/g; current 639mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 115mg/dL; current 106mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.25 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
